task.objective: Shave the promoted async WMMA lane below the current ~1 ms class on 4096^3 BF16, then use the result as the last cheap guardrail before a Hopper-native WGMMA/TMA lane.

baseline.name: hopper_tensor_core_bf16_async_wide
baseline.description: Hopper BF16 async WMMA lane widened to a 64x128x32 CTA so each stage amortizes more scheduling overhead before the WGMMA/TMA path lands.

control.name: hopper_cublaslt_bf16
control.description: Hopper cuBLASLt BF16 GEMM control lane for measuring the hardware-native library ceiling before a custom TMA/WGMMA implementation lands.

profile_protocol: python3 kernels/lab/kernel_lab.py --nvcc nvcc bench-suite --phase compile --repeats 1 --warmup 0 --label hopper-sm90-gap-close-compile --progress --name hopper_tensor_core_bf16_async_wide --name hopper_tensor_core_bf16_async_wide_k64 --name hopper_tensor_core_bf16_async_square --name hopper_tensor_core_bf16_async_square_k64 --name hopper_cublaslt_bf16

python3 kernels/lab/kernel_lab.py --nvcc nvcc bench-suite --phase run --repeats 5 --warmup 1 --label hopper-sm90-gap-close --progress --name hopper_tensor_core_bf16_async_wide --name hopper_tensor_core_bf16_async_wide_k64 --name hopper_tensor_core_bf16_async_square --name hopper_tensor_core_bf16_async_square_k64 --name hopper_cublaslt_bf16
benchmark_plan.promotion_rule: winner becomes next baseline for matching task_kind/backend/arch

result.notes: Promote 128x128x64 async WMMA square lane after zero-diff 512^3 correctness and 148.394 TFLOPS steady-state on H100. This is the best cheap shave on the ~1 ms class, but it still sits far from the cuBLASLt ceiling, so the main gap-close path now belongs to the Hopper-native WGMMA/TMA lane.

winner.name: hopper_tensor_core_bf16_async_square_k64
winner.description: Hopper BF16 async WMMA square lane with a 128x128x64 CTA to test the last cheap work-per-stage lever before the WGMMA/TMA path takes over.

promoted_baseline.notes: Promote 128x128x64 async WMMA square lane after zero-diff 512^3 correctness and 148.394 TFLOPS steady-state on H100. This is the best cheap shave on the ~1 ms class, but it still sits far from the cuBLASLt ceiling, so the main gap-close path now belongs to the Hopper-native WGMMA/TMA lane.
